_comment: OpenClawing2 v3.0 observability dashboard. Mount in Grafana at /d/openclaw. Every panel reads from pkg/nexus/observability's PrometheusBridge exposed at /metrics (Phase 8 P8.T4). Panels mirror the ten-category coverage matrix so operators see at a glance whether any phase is regressing.
title: HelixQA — OpenClawing2 v3.0

panels.title: Agent session opens (Phase 2)
panels.description: Tracks Agent.PrepareContext throughput. Rises with fleet size, drops on backend outages.

panels.title: Active browser sessions
panels.description: Gauge from browser.InstrumentedEngine. Should stay bounded by the pool size; runaway growth indicates a Close() leak.

panels.title: Agent step p95 (Phase 2)
panels.description: Orchestration overhead per Step(). Baseline ≈ 20μs with the in-memory fake planner; ~200ms-2s on real LLMs.

panels.title: MessageManager compaction rate (Phase 3)
panels.description: How often MessageManager.Compact actually digests turns. Steady non-zero means the token budget is doing work.

panels.title: Retry backoff attempts (Phase 4)
panels.description: Sum of attempts across every RetryWithBackoff call. Spikes correlate with upstream flake events.

panels.title: Loop-detector trips (Phase 4)
panels.description: Every trip is an escalation signal — the Agent got stuck in a 2- or 3-cycle. Should stay at 0 in healthy flows.

panels.title: SelfHealer invocations (Phase 4)
panels.description: Rising rate = selectors getting stale against the app under test.

panels.title: PromptCache hit ratio (Phase 5)
panels.description: Stagehand primitives hit/miss. Target >0.4 in steady-state flows.

panels.title: Coord-mode pixel-distance error (Phase 6)
panels.description: Difference between planner-provided and adapter-dispatched coordinates after scaling. Should be near-zero.

panels.title: Rich-ticket mandatory-field coverage (Phase 7)
panels.description: Fraction of tickets whose VerifyMandatory() returns empty. Must trend to 1.0.

panels.title: Go runtime — goroutines + heap (Phase 8 P5)
panels.description: Go-runtime + process collectors surfaced via the Nexus bridge. Leaks show as monotonic growth.

panels.title: Recent FINAL-REPORT outcomes
panels.description: One row per scripts/openclaw-full-campaign.sh run. Green row = every phase passed.

panels.title: Campaign critical alerts (MUST be 0)
panels.description: Section-9 campaign gate: this must read zero for two consecutive runs.

panels.title: CPU budget headroom
panels.description: Project constraint: 30–40% max host CPU. Panel shows 1 - used. Must stay >= 0.6.

panels.title: RAM budget headroom
panels.description: 8 GB total ceiling per the Catalogizer host-resource rule. Must stay >= 0.6 for the campaign to be gate-eligible.

panels.title: Bank test-case throughput (all OC-* banks)
panels.description: Per-bank test-case throughput across OpenClawing2 Phases 1..7. Every bank should appear; a missing line = the bank isn't wired into the runner.
